findings.description: A single rule only covers the masthead gradient (u_0008) while the blob contains at least three other distinct rule concerns: the approved gradient set governance (heading u_0000 'approved set — never invent gradients' plus table rows u_0003-u_0007), the horizontal direction/orientation constraint (u_0009), and the general usage/approved-values constraint (u_0010). These should be split into separate rules rather than left unextracted or folded into one.

new_rules.summary: Only the listed gradients (Brand Blue→Dark Navy, Sky Blue→Deep Blue, Sunshine→75% Gold, Golden Sand→White→Light Blue, Golden Sand→75% Gold→Sunshine, Sunshine→light gold masthead) are approved; never invent new gradients.
Gradients in masthead/banner applications run horizontally, dark/saturated to light, left to right.
Gradients used as backgrounds, in combination with wave graphic and LISRAYA logo mark; approved values only.

findings.description: The masthead gradient rule and the implicit 'approved set' governance statement in the heading lack explicit governance facets (e.g., exception/approval process, enforcement scope) despite the heading explicitly framing this as an approved, closed set ('never invent gradients'). No compliance/governance metadata is attached to any rule for this blob.

Rule name/scope 'masthead_gradient_with_logo_mark' does not capture the additional detail that the logo mark must sit at the lightest end of the gradient for contrast — this positional constraint is a distinct sub-rule/relation that is currently unstated in the rule payload.

payload.detail: Logo mark must sit at the lightest end of the Sunshine → light gold masthead gradient for contrast.

findings.description: Five of seven approved gradient definitions (non-masthead) have no corresponding rule at all in the candidate set, meaning their approved-set membership, stop colors, and usage context (dark backgrounds, blue backgrounds, warm backgrounds, soft light backgrounds, warm light-to-saturated backgrounds) are entirely unextracted.

payload.summary: Non-masthead approved gradients (Brand Blue→Dark Navy, Sky Blue→Deep Blue, Sunshine→75% Gold, Golden Sand→White→Light Blue, Golden Sand→75% Gold→Sunshine) with their designated usage contexts.
